headline: MEITUAN OPEN-SOURCES LONGCAT-2.0 — 1.6T AGENTIC CODER IT SAYS WAS TRAINED ON CHINESE CHIPS, ZERO NVIDIA
LONGCAT-2.0 WAS THE ANONYMOUS 'OWL ALPHA' — TOPPED OPENROUTER CODING CHARTS FOR WEEKS BEFORE MEITUAN UNMASKED IT
COGNITION SHIPS DEVIN FUSION — 'SIDEKICK' ROUTING HARNESS CLAIMS ~35% CHEAPER FABLE-CLASS CODING
MINIMAX M3 LANDS ON OPENROUTER AT $0.30/M INPUT — CHEAPEST 1M-CONTEXT MODEL, ~6% OF OPUS 4.8
